scripts.build: npm run build -w @sarathi/shared-types && npm run build -w @sarathi/shared-config && npm run build -w @sarathi/shared-persona && npm run build -w @sarathi/api && npm run build -w @sarathi/frontend
scripts.test: npm run build -w @sarathi/shared-types && npm run build -w @sarathi/shared-config && npm run build -w @sarathi/shared-persona && npm run test -w @sarathi/shared-types && npm run test -w @sarathi/shared-persona && npm run test -w @sarathi/api
